name: Ice Cream Christmas Pudding
recipeIngredient: Vanilla ice cream, 100 g packet (3 1/2 oz)
Round white marshmallows, 200 g (7 oz), chopped into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cherries and reserve the liquid.
2. Put the cherries and cherry marnier in a small bowl (do not add too much liqueur as it will prevent the ice cream from freezing). Let soak overnight.
3. The next day, remove the softened ice cream from the freezer.
4. Cut the marshmallows into quarters and add them to the cherries.
5. Transfer the ice cream to a large mixing bowl.
6. Stir in all the remaining ingredients and enough reserved cherry liquid to color the ice cream a pretty pale pink (add a few drops of pink food coloring if necessary).
7. Put the mixture into a lamington tin and freeze until firm.
8. Cover with two thicknesses of foil and store in the freezer until Christmas Day.
9. Cut into squares.
